ns0:entry.ns0:title: Facepunch/sbox-public
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Facepunch/sbox-public
Language: c%23
s&box is a modern game engine, built on Valve's Source 2 and the latest .NET technology, it provides a modern intuitive editor for creating games

ns0:entry.ns0:title: Flow-Launcher/Flow.Launcher
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Flow-Launcher/Flow.Launcher
Language: c%23
🔍 Quick file search & app launcher for Windows with community-made plugins

ns0:entry.ns0:title: Justsenger/ExHyperV
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Justsenger/ExHyperV
Language: c%23
The Excalibur of Hyper-V / Hyper-V 神器

ns0:entry.ns0:title: Klocman/Bulk-Crap-Uninstaller
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Klocman/Bulk-Crap-Uninstaller
Language: c%23
Remove large amounts of unwanted applications quickly.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: MudBlazor/MudBlazor
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/MudBlazor/MudBlazor
Language: c%23
Blazor Component Library based on Material Design principles with an emphasis on ease of use and extensibility

ns0:entry.ns0:title: ScottPlot/ScottPlot
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/ScottPlot/ScottPlot
Language: c%23
Interactive plotting library for .NET

ns0:entry.ns0:title: abpframework/abp
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/abpframework/abp
Language: c%23
Open-source web application framework for ASP.NET Core! Offers an opinionated architecture to build enterprise software solutions with best practices on top of the .NET. Provides the fundamental infrastructure, cross-cutting-concern implementations, startup templates, application modules, UI themes, tooling and documentation.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: actions/runner
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/actions/runner
Language: c%23
The Runner for GitHub Actions 🚀

ns0:entry.ns0:title: aras-p/UnityGaussianSplatting
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/aras-p/UnityGaussianSplatting
Language: c%23
Toy Gaussian Splatting visualization in Unity

ns0:entry.ns0:title: ardalis/CleanArchitecture
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/ardalis/CleanArchitecture
Language: c%23
Clean Architecture Solution Template: A proven Clean Architecture Template for ASP.NET Core 10

ns0:entry.ns0:title: aws/aws-lambda-dotnet
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/aws/aws-lambda-dotnet
Language: c%23
Libraries, samples and tools to help .NET Core developers develop AWS Lambda functions.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: btcpayserver/btcpayserver
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/btcpayserver/btcpayserver
Language: c%23
Accept Bitcoin payments. Free, open-source & self-hosted, Bitcoin payment processor.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: dotnet/aspnetcore
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/dotnet/aspnetcore
Language: c%23
ASP.NET Core is a cross-platform .NET framework for building modern cloud-based web applications on Windows, Mac, or Linux.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: dotnet/maui
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/dotnet/maui
Language: c%23
.NET MAUI is the .NET Multi-platform App UI, a framework for building native device applications spanning mobile, tablet, and desktop.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: dotnet/msbuild
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/dotnet/msbuild
Language: c%23
The Microsoft Build Engine (MSBuild) is the build platform for .NET and Visual Studio.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: dotnet/roslyn
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/dotnet/roslyn
Language: c%23
The Roslyn .NET compiler provides C# and Visual Basic languages with rich code analysis APIs.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: dotnet/runtime
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/dotnet/runtime
Language: c%23
.NET is a cross-platform runtime for cloud, mobile, desktop, and IoT apps.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: lucasg/Dependencies
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/lucasg/Dependencies
Language: c%23
A rewrite of the old legacy software "depends.exe" in C# for Windows devs to troubleshoot dll load dependencies issues.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: mRemoteNG/mRemoteNG
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/mRemoteNG/mRemoteNG
Language: c%23
mRemoteNG is the next generation of mRemote, open source, tabbed, multi-protocol, remote connections manager.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: microsoft/PowerToys
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/microsoft/PowerToys
Language: c%23
Microsoft PowerToys is a collection of utilities that supercharge productivity and customization on Windows

ns0:entry.ns0:title: microsoft/garnet
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/microsoft/garnet
Language: c%23
Garnet is a remote cache-store from Microsoft Research that offers strong performance (throughput and latency), scalability, storage, recovery, cluster sharding, key migration, and replication features. Garnet can work with existing Redis clients.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: microsoft/mcp
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/microsoft/mcp
Language: c%23
Catalog of official Microsoft MCP (Model Context Protocol) server implementations for AI-powered data access and tool integration

ns0:entry.ns0:title: microsoft/semantic-kernel
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/microsoft/semantic-kernel
Language: c%23
Integrate cutting-edge LLM technology quickly and easily into your apps

ns0:entry.ns0:title: mob-sakai/UIEffect
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/mob-sakai/UIEffect
Language: c%23
UIEffect is an open-source package that allows you to intuitively apply rich UI effects directly from the Inspector or via code. Combine various filters, such as grayscale, blur, and dissolve, to decorate your UI with a unique visual style!
